session.assistant:
## CI Results: FAILED
There are 2 failures in `make fast-ci`:
### 1. **Prettier Format Check** (2 files with style issues) ``` docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md ``` These files have code style issues. These are pre-existing issues in documentation files.
### 2. **Exec Reference Check** (out of date) ``` FAIL: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is out of date Run 'erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs' to regenerate it. ``` This is a pre-existing issue - the reference documentation needs regeneration.
### Tests Status: PASSED All unit tests passed successfully: - erk: 5844 passed in 12.03s - erk-dev: 136 passed in 4.24s - erk-statusline: 115 passed in 0.76s - erk-mcp: 24 passed (truncated output)
### Summary - **Linting**: PASSED - **Format Check**: PASSED - **Prettier Check**: FAILED (2 files) - **Markdown Check**: PASSED - **Exec Reference Check**: FAILED (out of date) - **Type Check (ty)**: PASSED - **All unit tests**: PASSED
The failures are pre-existing issues unrelated to any files you modified on this branch.
